title: Daisaku Yokoyama
text: Home * People * Daisaku Yokoyama Daisaku Yokoyama , a Japanese computer scientist, Shogi programmer, and research associate at University of Tokyo with interests in parallel computing , programming languages , robot programming , game-tree search , and computer-shogi [1] . Daisaku Yokoyama is co-author of the Shogi engine Gekisashi , Gold medal winner of the 15th Computer Olympiad, Shogi in Kanazawa .
